series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records related to grievances between the agency and employees or the union and the procedures used to resolve them. Grievance case files contain: 1) initial grievance forms and supporting documentation; 2) step (2-3) responses; and 3) correspondence between agency and employees and/or union representatives. Grievances that enter arbitration will also contain files related to the arbitration proceedings.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two years date case is closed and all remedies pursuant applicable labor agreement have been exhausted. Records are retained in HRM Labor Relations Office files. Record may be imaged; if imaged, paper may be destroyed when electronic record is validated. ; Electronic: two years date case is closed and all remedies pursuant applicable labor agreement have been exhausted. Records are retained in HRM Labor Relations network directory
